measure.intro: Measure yourself with a tape and enter the numbers below. Nothing leaves your phone except the measurements you choose to save — great if your size changes often.
measure.tip: Use a soft tape measure over light clothing. Keep the tape snug but not tight, and level all the way around. All values are in centimetres (cm).
measure.empty_error: Enter at least one measurement first.

how.neckGirth: Around the base of your neck, where a shirt collar sits.
how.acrossBackShoulderWidth: Across your upper back, from one shoulder tip to the other.
how.bustGirth: Around the fullest part of your chest/bust, tape level.
how.waistGirth: Around the narrowest part of your waist, roughly at the navel.
how.hipGirth: Around the fullest part of your hips and seat.
how.backNeckPointToWristLengthR: From the base of your neck, over the shoulder, down to the wrist.
how.thighGirthR: Around the fullest part of one thigh.
how.insideLegLengthR: From the crotch straight down to the ankle (inseam).

bodygram.title: Body Scan
bodygram.subtitle: Two photos — front and right side — give us your precise body measurements, so we can recommend the perfect size every time.
bodygram.tips: Prop the phone upright at chest height 2-3m away and use a timer. Wear fitted clothing, plain background, whole body in frame, arms angled 30-45° out. Stay centered — the photo sides get trimmed.
bodygram.estimate_hint: Add both photos for the most accurate results.
bodygram.invalid_stats: Please enter a valid age, height and weight.
bodygram.photo_error: Could not load that photo. Please try again.
bodygram.generic_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
bodygram.err_not_in_frame: your whole body must be in the frame. Step back so your head and feet are both visible.
bodygram.err_arm_angle: hold your arms straight, angled about 30-45° away from your body. Don't hold the phone yourself - prop it up and use a timer.
bodygram.err_leg_angle: stand straight with your feet about shoulder-width apart.
bodygram.err_generic: Scan failed ({}). Check your pose and photos, then try again.
bodygram.err_no_credits: You're out of Bodygram scan credits. Top up your balance in the Bodygram dashboard, then try again.

capture.guided_camera_sub: Follow the on-screen body guide; it snaps automatically when you're in the right pose.

capture.hint_head: Move so your head is in the frame
capture.hint_center: Move to the center of the frame
capture.hint_turn_side: Turn to show your right side
capture.hint_arms_out: Move your arms away from your body
capture.hint_arms_down: Relax your arms down by your sides
capture.shutter_hint: Tap to start the timer now
